roman_arena.name: Broken Roman Arena
roman_arena.description: Elliptical amphitheater with isolated test-case outputs. Viewer reconstruction is validated against the deterministic synthetic reference surface for the selected test case.

baseline_demolition.name: Case 1 - Baseline demolished sector
baseline_demolition.description: Preserves the previously working Roman Arena test data.

north_rim_blast.name: Case 2 - Absurd north-rim blast
north_rim_blast.description: Large missing upper facade and seating region.

diagonal_collapse.name: Case 3 - Diagonal collapse scar
diagonal_collapse.description: Unrealistic diagonal missing band through facade and seating.

absurd_half_chop.name: Case 4 - Absurd half-chop demolition
absurd_half_chop.description: Roughly half the amphitheater is removed with a height-varying, non-symmetric boundary across facade and seating.

palmyra_arch.name: Broken Palmyra Arch
palmyra_arch.description: Freestanding arch with independent test cases. Core output is preserved; viewer output uses a subject adapter. Viewer reconstruction is validated against the deterministic synthetic reference surface for the selected test case.

left_upper_breach.name: Case 1 - Left upper breach
left_upper_breach.description: Missing upper-left block and arch shoulder.

right_pier_shear.name: Case 2 - Right pier shear
right_pier_shear.description: Large vertical missing section through the right pier.

crown_column_blast.name: Case 3 - Crown and column blast
crown_column_blast.description: Missing crown portion plus opposite column crater.

absurd_half_chop.name: Case 4 - Absurd half-chop demolition
absurd_half_chop.description: A diagonal, non-symmetric half-facade chop through the arch, base, and columns.

leaning_tower.name: Demolished Leaning Tower of Pisa
leaning_tower.description: Synthetic 3D Leaning Tower of Pisa style monument: leaning cylindrical tower with galleries, arches, columns, ring slabs, top bell chamber, base steps, and isolated demolition cases. Petra has been removed.

upper_bell_collapse.name: Case 1 - Upper bell-chamber collapse
upper_bell_collapse.description: Collapsed upper bell chamber and surrounding gallery rings on one side of the leaning tower.

lower_arcade_breach.name: Case 2 - Lower arcade breach
lower_arcade_breach.description: Large demolished lower gallery section with base-step damage and rubble.

diagonal_tower_crack.name: Case 3 - Diagonal shaft crack
diagonal_tower_crack.description: Diagonal missing band crossing the leaning cylindrical shaft and outer columns.

absurd_half_chop.name: Case 4 - Absurd half-chop demolition
absurd_half_chop.description: A twisting half-tower chop that removes one irregular side of the leaning cylinder, galleries, rings, and bell chamber.
